title: Benjamin Shaar Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Benjamin Shaar Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Benjamin Shaar
Undergraduate Student
BS in Computer Science ’27
Oakland Campus
By the time Benjamin Shaar came to Khoury College, he was a studied pianist with over a decade of training. Now pursuing computer science, he wants to unlock the intersection between his two passions.
I really just feel like I’m connected with music for life. … Music and computer science can definitely connect on a deep level. … Maybe I’ll develop one of those softwares
Benjamin Shaar, BSCS ’27
Explore all Khoury Stories
